name: CW SCAF (RX audio filter)
author: contributors
description: Switched-capacitor-style variable-bandwidth CW audio filter on the RX (post-demod) path. Cascade of RBJ constant-0 dB-peak bandpass biquads centred on the operator's CW pitch, with adjustable bandwidth and section count to sharpen the skirts. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency. Prototype: parameters via REST (/api/plugins/{id}/params); React panel ships in a follow-up.
